title: Migrated Docs Logs To Per-Entry JSON
summary: Migrated canonical docs-log entries from monthly JSONL buckets to flat per-entry JSON files and updated the docs-log helper, migration, and index scripts to use the new source shape.
effect: Codex and scripts can now retrieve individual change-history records without opening large month files, while generated indexes and the manage-only change-history report keep the same projection shape.
